positive: A highly detailed, vibrant linocut style illustration of a stylized celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) surrounded by blooming cosmic flowers and glowing nebula dust. The fox should be depicted in a dynamic, elegant pose, leaping over a crescent moon that functions as a decorative ring. The composition must be perfectly centered, featuring strong, clean silhouettes against a deep indigo and teal cosmic background. Use a limited, jewel-toned color palette of sapphire blue, amethyst purple, gold leaf accents, and emerald green for maximum contrast and print impact. Emphasize stylized botanical elements and mystical energy lines, perfect for a wearable art print. Artwork must be vector-like and highly scalable.
negative: blurry, photographic, amateur, low detail, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, writing, bad anatomy, extra limbs, signature, messy, noise, grain, poor composition
